visa_type_detail.name: Category A
visa_type_detail.description: Persons with annual income reaching HK$2.5 million or above, or its equivalent in foreign currency, in the year immediately preceding the date of application.

visa_type_detail.name: Category B
visa_type_detail.description: Degree graduates of the eligible universities with at least three years of work experience over the past five years immediately preceding the date of application.

visa_type_detail.name: Category C
visa_type_detail.description: Degree graduates of the eligible universities in the past five years immediately preceding the date of application with less than three years of work experience, subject to an annual quota.

data.processing_time: It normally takes four weeks to process visa/entry permit applications under the TTPS upon receipt of all the required documents and the relevant application fee.

essential_apps.description: Digital identity app for accessing government services and online transactions.
Mobile banking app for HSBC, a prominent bank in Hong Kong.
Official app for the MTR (Mass Transit Railway) system, including journey planner and fare information.
Manage your Octopus card for public transport and retail payments.
